<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,maximum-scale=1,user-scalable=no">
<title>NOT IN PARIS</title>
<style>
@font-face {
  font-family: 'CoolveticaCondensed';
  src: url('data:font/otf;base64,') format('opentype');
  font-weight: normal;
  font-style: normal;
}
@font-face {
  font-family: 'Coolvetica';
  src: url('data:font/otf;base64,') format('opentype');
  font-weight: normal;
  font-style: normal;
}
</style>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/qrcodejs/1.0.0/qrcode.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/jsqr@1.4.0/dist/jsQR.js"></script>
<style>
:root{
  --black:#080808;--white:#F5F2EC;--grey:#141414;--mid:#1e1e1e;
  --dim:#555;--green:#4CAF50;--gold:#FFD700;--red:#FF4500;--blue:#4A90E2;
  --fd:'CoolveticaCondensed',sans-serif;
  --fr:'Coolvetica',sans-serif;
  --fb:'DM Sans',sans-serif;
  --fm:'Space Mono',monospace;
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
html,body{background:var(--black);color:var(--white);font-family:var(--fb);height:100%;overflow:hidden}

/* SCREENS - fixed full screen, no scroll bleed */
html,body{height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:var(–black)}
#app{position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(–black)}
.screen{
position:fixed;inset:0;
background:var(–black);
overflow-y:scroll;overflow-x:hidden;
-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
visibility:hidden;
pointer-events:none;
z-index:1;
}
.screen.active{
visibility:visible;
pointer-events:auto;
z-index:10;
}

/* NAV */
.nav{
position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;
background:rgba(8,8,8,.97);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
border-bottom:1px solid #1a1a1a;
padding:12px 18px;
display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;
}
.nav-brand{font-family:var(–fd);font-size:24px;letter-spacing:4px;color:var(–white)}
.nb{
font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;color:var(–dim);
background:none;border:1px solid #252525;padding:5px 9px;border-radius:3px;
cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:1px;transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap;
}
.nb:hover{color:var(–white);border-color:#444}
.nb.gold{color:var(–gold);border-color:rgba(255,215,0,.3)}

/* LANDING */
#s-land{
display:flex;flex-direction:column;
align-items:center;justify-content:center;
min-height:100%;padding:0 28px;text-align:center;
}
.land-logo{font-family:var(–fd);font-size:72px;letter-spacing:8px;line-height:.9;margin-bottom:16px;color:var(–white)}
.land-sub{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:9px;color:var(–dim);letter-spacing:3px;margin-bottom:56px}
.land-btns{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;width:100%;max-width:280px}
.lbtn{
width:100%;padding:14px;border:none;border-radius:3px;
font-family:var(–fd);font-size:20px;letter-spacing:3px;
cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;
}
.lbtn.primary{background:var(–white);color:var(–black)}
.lbtn.primary:active{background:#ddd}
.lbtn.outline{background:none;color:var(–white);border:1px solid #2a2a2a;font-size:13px;padding:12px}
.lbtn.ghost{background:none;color:#2a2a2a;border:1px solid #181818;font-size:11px;padding:10px}
.land-admin{position:fixed;bottom:20px;right:18px;font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;color:#1e1e1e;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:1px}

/* SHARED FORM PAGE */
.page-wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-height:100%}
.page-body{flex:1;padding:32px 20px 60px}
.page-title{font-family:var(–fd);font-size:52px;letter-spacing:4px;line-height:1;margin-bottom:8px;text-align:center}
.page-sub{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:9px;color:var(–dim);letter-spacing:1px;text-align:center;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:32px}

/* FIELDS */
.f{margin-bottom:14px}
.f label{display:block;font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;color:var(–dim);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px}
.f input,.f textarea,.f select{
width:100%;background:var(–grey);border:1px solid #202020;border-radius:3px;
padding:13px 15px;color:var(–white);font-family:var(–fb);font-size:15px;
outline:none;transition:border-color .2s;-webkit-appearance:none;
}
.f input:focus,.f textarea:focus,.f select:focus{border-color:#383838}
.f input::placeholder{color:#2e2e2e}
.f textarea{resize:none;height:80px}
.f-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px}

/* HINT BOXES */
.hint-box{background:#07111a;border:1px solid #122030;border-left:3px solid #1a4a7a;border-radius:3px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:12px;color:#7090b0;line-height:1.7}
.ref-ok{display:none;background:#080f06;border:1px solid rgba(76,175,80,.2);border-left:3px solid var(–green);border-radius:3px;padding:10px 14px;margin-top:-6px;margin-bottom:12px;font-family:var(–fm);font-size:9px;color:var(–green)}
.ref-err{display:none;background:#0f0806;border:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.2);border-left:3px solid var(–red);border-radius:3px;padding:10px 14px;margin-top:-6px;margin-bottom:12px;font-family:var(–fm);font-size:9px;color:var(–red)}
.err-msg{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:9px;color:var(–red);letter-spacing:1px;text-align:center;min-height:18px;margin-bottom:8px}

/* BUTTONS */
.btn{
width:100%;background:var(–white);color:var(–black);border:none;border-radius:3px;
padding:16px;font-family:var(–fd);font-size:21px;letter-spacing:3px;
cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;margin-top:4px;
}
.btn:active{transform:scale(.98);background:#ddd}
.btn:disabled{background:#252525;color:#555;cursor:not-allowed}
.btn-back{
font-family:var(–fm);font-size:9px;color:var(–dim);
background:none;border:1px solid #252525;padding:11px 20px;border-radius:3px;
cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:1px;transition:all .2s;
}
.btn-back:hover{color:var(–white);border-color:#444}
.link-txt{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:9px;color:var(–dim);text-align:center;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline;text-underline-offset:3px;margin-top:12px}

/* PENDING */
#s-pending{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:100%;padding:40px 24px;text-align:center}
.pend-ico{font-size:52px;margin-bottom:20px}

/* MEMBER BAR */
.member-bar{background:#07100a;border-bottom:1px solid #152010;padding:9px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.mb-name{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:9px;color:#5a8a3a;letter-spacing:1px}
.mb-ref{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;color:#3a5a2a;letter-spacing:1px;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline;text-underline-offset:2px}
.ref-count{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;color:#3a5a2a;letter-spacing:1px}

/* CAROUSEL */
.c-section{padding:16px 0 0}
.c-label{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;color:var(–dim);letter-spacing:3px;padding:0 18px 12px}
.c-vp{overflow:hidden;padding:0 18px;touch-action:pan-y}
.c-track{display:flex;gap:10px;transition:transform .42s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);will-change:transform}
.pc{flex:0 0 calc(100vw - 60px);max-width:320px;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #1a1a1a;background:#111;transition:transform .15s}
.pc:active{transform:scale(.985)}
.pc img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:4/5;object-fit:cover;display:block;pointer-events:none;user-select:none}
.pc-meta{padding:10px 14px 12px;background:var(–grey);border-top:1px solid #1a1a1a}
.pc-name{font-family:var(–fd);font-size:24px;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(–white);line-height:1}
.pc-row{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center}
.pc-genre{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;color:var(–dim);border:1px solid #252525;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:2px}
.pc-date{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;color:#3a3a3a}
.pc-sel{position:absolute;inset:0;border:2px solid var(–white);border-radius:3px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .25s;pointer-events:none}
.pc.sel .pc-sel{opacity:1}
.pc-chk{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;background:var(–white);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:0;transform:scale(.5);transition:all .25s;pointer-events:none;font-size:11px;color:var(–black);font-weight:700}
.pc.sel .pc-chk{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}
.dots{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:5px;padding:12px 0 0}
.dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:#252525;transition:all .3s;cursor:pointer}
.dot.active{background:var(–white);width:20px;border-radius:3px}
.c-hint{text-align:center;padding:8px 18px 0;font-family:var(–fm);font-size:9px;color:var(–dim);letter-spacing:2px;min-height:26px;transition:color .3s}
.c-hint.ok{color:var(–green)}

/* RES FORM */
.res-form{padding:16px 18px 60px}
.evt-note{display:none;background:#0d0d0d;border:1px solid #1a1a1a;border-left:3px solid #2a2a2a;border-radius:3px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:14px;font-family:var(–fm);font-size:9px;color:#777;line-height:1.8}
.evt-sel-box{background:var(–grey);border:1px solid #202020;border-radius:3px;padding:12px 15px;min-height:48px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px}
.evt-sel-none{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:10px;color:var(–dim);font-style:italic}
.evt-sel-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(–white);flex-shrink:0;display:none}
.evt-sel-txt{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:10px;color:var(–white);line-height:1.5;display:none}
.count-row{display:flex;align-items:center;background:var(–grey);border:1px solid #202020;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden}
.cnt-btn{width:48px;height:48px;background:none;border:none;color:var(–white);font-size:22px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;transition:background .15s}
.cnt-btn:hover{background:#202020}
.cnt-val{flex:1;text-align:center;font-family:var(–fd);font-size:26px;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(–white)}

/* RULES CHECKBOX */
.rules-box{background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid #1a1a1a;border-radius:3px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:14px}
.rules-text{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:9px;color:#777;line-height:1.9;letter-spacing:.3px;margin-bottom:12px;max-height:120px;overflow-y:auto}
.rules-check-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;cursor:pointer}
.rules-check-row input[type=checkbox]{width:18px;height:18px;accent-color:var(–white);cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0}
.rules-check-label{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:9px;color:var(–dim);letter-spacing:.5px;line-height:1.5}

/* TICKET */
#s-ticket{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding:40px 20px 60px;min-height:100%}
.tk-ico{font-size:40px;margin-bottom:14px}
.tk-title{font-family:var(–fd);font-size:48px;letter-spacing:5px;line-height:1;text-align:center;margin-bottom:8px}
.tk-sub{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:9px;color:var(–dim);letter-spacing:2px;text-align:center;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:20px}
.tk-status{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1.7;padding:11px 16px;border-radius:3px;margin-bottom:20px;text-align:center;width:100%;max-width:310px;transition:all .4s}
.tk-status.pending{color:var(–gold);background:rgba(255,215,0,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,215,0,.2)}
.tk-status.approved{color:var(–green);background:rgba(76,175,80,.08);border:1px solid rgba(76,175,80,.25)}
.tk-status.rejected{color:var(–red);background:rgba(255,69,0,.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.2)}
.ticket{width:100%;max-width:310px;background:var(–grey);border:1px solid #222;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:20px}
.tk-head{background:var(–white);color:var(–black);padding:13px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.tk-head-name{font-family:var(–fd);font-size:20px;letter-spacing:2px}
.tk-badge{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:2px;letter-spacing:1px;transition:all .3s}
.tk-body{padding:14px 18px}
.tk-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:10px}
.tk-lbl{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;color:var(–dim);letter-spacing:2px}
.tk-val{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:11px;color:var(–white);text-align:right;line-height:1.4}
.tk-div{border:none;border-top:1px dashed #252525;margin:12px 0}
.qr-zone{background:#050505;padding:20px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.qr-wrap{background:white;padding:10px;border-radius:3px}
.qr-id{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;color:var(–dim);letter-spacing:3px}
.qr-badge{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;color:var(–red);letter-spacing:1px;border:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.3);padding:3px 10px;border-radius:20px}

/* ADMIN */
#s-admin{min-height:100%}
.admin-nav{background:rgba(8,8,8,.97);border-bottom:1px solid #1a1a1a;padding:10px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;gap:6px}
.admin-title{font-family:var(–fd);font-size:18px;letter-spacing:3px}
.admin-badge{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:7px;color:var(–red);letter-spacing:2px;border:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.3);padding:3px 8px;border-radius:2px}
.live-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px}
.live-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(–green);animation:pulse 2s infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.2}}
.live-txt{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:7px;color:var(–green);letter-spacing:1px}
.a-tabs{display:flex;border-bottom:1px solid #1a1a1a;overflow-x:auto}
.a-tab{flex:1;min-width:50px;padding:11px 3px;font-family:var(–fm);font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3px;text-align:center;color:var(–dim);cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap}
.a-tab.active{color:var(–white);border-bottom-color:var(–white)}
.a-panel{display:none;padding:16px}.a-panel.active{display:block}
.stats-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px}
.stat{background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–mid);border-radius:3px;padding:12px 4px;text-align:center}
.stat-n{font-family:var(–fd);font-size:36px;line-height:1}
.stat-n.o{color:var(–red)}.stat-n.g{color:var(–green)}.stat-n.gold{color:var(–gold)}.stat-n.b{color:var(–blue)}
.stat-l{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:6px;color:var(–dim);letter-spacing:1px;margin-top:2px}
.sec{font-family:var(–fd);font-size:13px;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(–dim);margin-bottom:8px}
.hr{border:none;border-top:1px solid #1a1a1a;margin:16px 0}
.ai{width:100%;background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid #202020;border-radius:3px;padding:10px 12px;color:var(–white);font-family:var(–fb);font-size:13px;outline:none;margin-bottom:8px;transition:border-color .2s;-webkit-appearance:none}
.ai:focus{border-color:#333}
.at2{width:100%;background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid #202020;border-radius:3px;padding:10px 12px;color:var(–white);font-family:var(–fb);font-size:12px;outline:none;margin-bottom:8px;resize:none;line-height:1.6}
.at2:focus{border-color:#333}
.ag{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px}
.ag .ai{margin-bottom:0}
.ab{width:100%;background:var(–white);color:var(–black);border:none;border-radius:3px;padding:12px;font-family:var(–fd);font-size:16px;letter-spacing:2px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;margin-bottom:7px}
.ab:disabled{background:#252525;color:#555;cursor:not-allowed}
.ab.sec{background:none;color:var(–white);border:1px solid #282828;font-size:11px}
.ab.danger{background:none;color:var(–red);border:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.3);font-size:11px}
.ab.seed{background:none;color:var(–gold);border:1px solid rgba(255,215,0,.3);font-size:11px}
.uz{border:2px dashed #252525;border-radius:3px;padding:20px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;background:#0a0a0a;position:relative;margin-bottom:10px}
.uz input{position:absolute;inset:0;opacity:0;cursor:pointer;width:100%;height:100%}
.pp{display:none;margin-bottom:10px;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;position:relative}
.pp img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:4/5;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.pp-rm{position:absolute;top:8px;right:8px;width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(0,0,0,.8);border:1px solid #444;color:var(–white);font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.card{background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–mid);border-radius:3px;margin-bottom:8px;overflow:hidden}
.card-h{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:11px 13px;cursor:pointer;gap:8px}
.card-name{font-family:var(–fd);font-size:21px;color:var(–white);letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1}
.card-meta{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;color:var(–dim);letter-spacing:.3px;margin-top:2px;line-height:1.7}
.card-b{display:none;padding:0 13px 13px;flex-direction:column;gap:7px}
.card-b.open{display:flex}
.card-det{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;color:var(–dim);line-height:2.2;padding:5px 0;border-top:1px solid #1a1a1a}
.bdg{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;letter-spacing:1px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:2px;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0}
.bdg.p{background:rgba(255,215,0,.1);color:var(–gold);border:1px solid rgba(255,215,0,.3)}
.bdg.a{background:rgba(76,175,80,.1);color:var(–green);border:1px solid rgba(76,175,80,.3)}
.bdg.r{background:rgba(255,69,0,.1);color:var(–red);border:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.3)}
.bdg.u{background:rgba(100,100,100,.1);color:#444;border:1px solid rgba(100,100,100,.3)}
.act-btn{padding:10px;border-radius:3px;font-family:var(–fm);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1px;cursor:pointer;border:none;text-align:center;transition:all .2s}
.act-btn.approve{background:rgba(76,175,80,.1);color:var(–green);border:1px solid rgba(76,175,80,.25)}
.act-btn.reject{background:rgba(255,69,0,.07);color:var(–red);border:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.2)}
.member-code-box{background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid rgba(255,215,0,.2);border-radius:3px;padding:9px 13px;font-family:var(–fm);font-size:12px;color:var(–gold);letter-spacing:3px;text-align:center}
.ref-info{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;color:var(–dim);line-height:1.8;padding:6px 0}
.ec{background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–mid);border-radius:3px;margin-bottom:10px;overflow:hidden}
.et{display:flex;align-items:stretch}
.eth{width:54px;flex-shrink:0;overflow:hidden;background:#0a0a0a}
.eth img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.eth-ph{width:100%;height:100%;min-height:68px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.eth-ph span{font-family:var(–fd);font-size:7px;color:#252525;text-align:center;padding:4px}
.ei{flex:1;padding:10px 12px 8px}
.ei-name{font-family:var(–fd);font-size:17px;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1}
.ei-genre{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:7px;color:var(–dim);letter-spacing:1px;margin-top:2px}
.ei-date{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:7px;color:#3a3a3a;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-top:2px}
.cap-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;margin-top:6px}
.cap-bg{flex:1;height:2px;background:#252525;border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden}
.cap-fill{height:100%;background:var(–white);border-radius:2px;transition:width .5s}
.cap-fill.warn{background:var(–gold)}.cap-fill.full{background:var(–red)}
.cap-txt{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:7px;color:var(–dim);white-space:nowrap}
.e-acts{display:flex;border-top:1px solid #1a1a1a}
.e-act{flex:1;padding:8px;font-family:var(–fm);font-size:7px;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(–dim);background:none;border:none;border-right:1px solid #1a1a1a;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.e-act:last-child{border-right:none}
.e-act:hover{color:var(–white);background:#1a1a1a}
.e-act.del:hover{color:var(–red)}
.chs{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:10px}
.ch{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:7px;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #252525;color:var(–dim);background:none;letter-spacing:1px;transition:all .2s}
.ch.active{color:var(–white);border-color:#3a3a3a;background:#1a1a1a}
.ch.active.p{border-color:rgba(255,215,0,.4);color:var(–gold)}
.ch.active.a{border-color:rgba(76,175,80,.4);color:var(–green)}
.fr{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px}
.fr select{flex:1;background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid #202020;border-radius:3px;padding:8px 11px;color:var(–white);font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;outline:none;-webkit-appearance:none}
.scan-box{background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid var(–mid);border-radius:3px;padding:24px 16px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:12px}
.scan-ico{font-size:44px;margin-bottom:10px}
.scan-lbl{font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;color:var(–dim);letter-spacing:2px}
.qr-inp-row{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:12px}
.qr-inp-row input{flex:1;background:var(–grey);border:1px solid #282828;border-radius:3px;padding:12px;color:var(–white);font-family:var(–fm);font-size:13px;outline:none;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:3px}
.qr-go{background:var(–white);color:var(–black);border:none;border-radius:3px;padding:12px 14px;font-family:var(–fd);font-size:15px;cursor:pointer}
.qr-res{display:none;border-radius:3px;padding:16px;margin-top:10px;font-family:var(–fm);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1.9;text-align:center}
.qr-res.v{background:rgba(76,175,80,.07);color:var(–green);border:1px solid rgba(76,175,80,.2)}
.qr-res.i{background:rgba(255,69,0,.07);color:var(–red);border:1px solid rgba(255,69,0,.2)}
.qr-res.u{background:rgba(100,100,100,.07);color:#555;border:1px solid rgba(100,100,100,.2)}
.qr-big{font-family:var(–fd);font-size:36px;letter-spacing:3px;display:block;margin-bottom:5px}
.spin{width:24px;height:24px;border:2px solid #1a1a1a;border-top-color:var(–white);border-radius:50%;animation:spin .7s linear infinite;margin:20px auto}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
.empty{text-align:center;padding:32px;font-family:var(–fm);font-size:8px;color:var(–dim);letter-spacing:1px;line-height:2}
.toast{position:fixed;bottom:24px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:var(–white);color:var(–black);font-family:var(–fm);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1px;padding:10px 18px;border-radius:3px;z-index:9999;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;pointer-events:none;white-space:nowrap;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.6)}
.toast.show{opacity:1}
.add-wrap{background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–mid);border-radius:3px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:12px}
.rules-admin-box{background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid #202020;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:8px}
.rules-admin-box textarea{width:100%;background:transparent;border:none;padding:10px 12px;color:var(–white);font-family:var(–fb);font-size:12px;outline:none;resize:none;height:80px;line-height:1.6}
</style>

</head>
<body>
<div id="app">

<!-- LANDING -->

<div class="screen" id="s-land">
  <div class="land-logo">NOT IN<br>PARIS</div>
  <div class="land-sub">MEMBERS ONLY</div>
  <div class="land-btns">
    <button class="lbtn primary" onclick="G('s-login')">SIGN IN</button>
    <button class="lbtn outline" onclick="G('s-register')">APPLY FOR MEMBERSHIP</button>
  </div>
  <button class="land-admin" onclick="goAdmin()">admin ↗</button>
</div>

<!-- LOGIN -->

<div class="screen active" id="s-login">
  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding:48px 28px 0">
    <div style="font-family:var(--fd);font-size:56px;letter-spacing:-1px;color:var(--white);text-align:center;line-height:1;margin-bottom:8px;white-space:nowrap;word-spacing:4px">NOT IN PARIS</div>
    <div id="brandSlogan" style="font-family:var(--fm);font-size:9px;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:3px;margin-bottom:40px;text-align:center">MEMBERS ONLY</div>
  </div>
  <div class="page-body" style="padding-top:0">
    <div class="page-sub" style="text-align:left;margin-bottom:28px">Enter your email and password to access events.</div>
    <div class="f"><label>Email</label><input type="email" id="loginEmail" placeholder="your@email.com" autocomplete="email"></div>
    <div class="f"><label>Password</label><input type="password" id="loginPw" placeholder="••••••••" autocomplete="current-password" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')doLogin()"></div>
    <div class="err-msg" id="loginErr"></div>
    <button class="btn" id="loginBtn" onclick="doLogin()">SIGN IN</button>
    <div class="link-txt" onclick="G('s-register')">Don't have an account? Apply →</div>
    <div class="link-txt" style="margin-top:6px;font-size:8px;color:#252525" onclick="G('s-admin-login')">admin</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- REGISTER -->

<div class="screen" id="s-register">
  <div class="nav">
    <span class="nav-brand">APPLY</span>
    <button class="nb" onclick="G('s-land')">← BACK</button>
  </div>
  <div class="page-body">
    <div class="page-sub" style="text-align:left;margin-bottom:24px">Applications are reviewed manually. You'll be notified once approved.</div>
    <div class="f">
      <label>Referral Code</label>
      <input type="text" id="refInput" placeholder="NIP-MBR-XXXXXX" maxlength="14" oninput="this.value=this.value.toUpperCase();checkRef(this.value)">
    </div>
    <div class="ref-ok" id="refOk"></div>
    <div class="ref-err" id="refErr"></div>
    <div class="f"><label>Full Name</label><input type="text" id="regName" placeholder="Your full name"></div>
    <div class="f"><label>Email</label><input type="email" id="regEmail" placeholder="your@email.com" autocomplete="email"></div>
    <div class="f"><label>Password</label><input type="password" id="regPw" placeholder="Min 8 characters" autocomplete="new-password"></div>
    <div class="f"><label>Phone</label><input type="tel" id="regPhone" placeholder="+90 5xx xxx xx xx"></div>
    <div class="f"><label>Instagram</label><input type="text" id="regInsta" placeholder="@username"></div>
    <div class="err-msg" id="regErr"></div>
    <button class="btn" id="regBtn" onclick="doRegister()">APPLY</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PENDING -->

<div class="screen" id="s-pending">
  <div class="pend-ico">⏳</div>
  <div class="page-title" style="margin-bottom:12px">APPLICATION<br>RECEIVED</div>
  <div class="page-sub">Your application is under review.<br>You'll receive your membership code once approved.</div>
  <button class="btn-back" style="margin-top:24px" onclick="G('s-land')">← Back to Home</button>
</div>

<!-- CUSTOMER -->

<div class="screen" id="s-customer">
  <div class="nav">
    <span class="nav-brand">NOT IN PARIS</span>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:6px">
      <button class="nb gold" id="memberCodeBtn" onclick="showCode()">🎫</button>
      <button class="nb" onclick="doLogout()">OUT</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="member-bar">
    <span class="mb-name" id="mbName">—</span>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
      <span class="ref-count" id="refCount"></span>
      <span class="mb-ref" onclick="copyRef()">🔗 Copy referral link</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="c-section">
    <div class="c-label">// UPCOMING EVENTS — SWIPE</div>
    <div class="c-vp" id="cVP"><div class="c-track" id="cTrack"><div class="spin"></div></div></div>
    <div class="dots" id="dots"></div>
    <div class="c-hint" id="cHint">Tap an event to make a reservation ↑</div>
  </div>
  <div class="res-form">
    <div class="hint-box" id="annBox">Loading...</div>
    <div class="evt-note" id="evtNote"></div>
    <div class="f"><label>Selected Event</label>
      <div class="evt-sel-box">
        <span class="evt-sel-none" id="evtSelNone">Select an event above</span>
        <span class="evt-sel-dot" id="evtSelDot"></span>
        <span class="evt-sel-txt" id="evtSelTxt"></span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="f"><label>Full Name</label><input type="text" id="fName" placeholder="Your full name"></div>
    <div class="f"><label>Phone</label><input type="tel" id="fPhone" placeholder="+90"></div>
    <div class="f"><label>Number of Guests</label>
      <div class="count-row">
        <button class="cnt-btn" onclick="chgCnt(-1)">−</button>
        <div class="cnt-val" id="cntVal">2</div>
        <button class="cnt-btn" onclick="chgCnt(1)">+</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="f"><label>Note (Optional)</label><textarea id="fNote" placeholder="Special requests..."></textarea></div>
    <!-- Rules checkbox - shown when event has rules -->
    <div class="rules-box" id="rulesBox" style="display:none">
      <div class="rules-text" id="rulesText"></div>
      <label class="rules-check-row">
        <input type="checkbox" id="rulesCheck">
        <span class="rules-check-label">I have read and agree to the event rules</span>
      </label>
    </div>
    <button class="btn" id="subBtn" onclick="doRes()">REQUEST RESERVATION</button>
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:16px;font-family:var(--fm);font-size:8px;color:#1e1e1e;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:2">Gender balance is required at all events.</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- TICKET -->

<div class="screen" id="s-ticket">
  <div class="nav">
    <span class="nav-brand">YOUR TICKET</span>
    <button class="nb" onclick="goBackRes()">← BACK</button>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:24px 20px 60px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center">
    <div class="tk-status pending" id="tkStatus">⏳ PENDING APPROVAL<br>Your reservation is being reviewed.</div>
    <div class="ticket">
      <div class="tk-head">
        <span class="tk-head-name">NOT IN PARIS</span>
        <span class="tk-badge" id="tkBadge" style="background:var(--gold);color:#000">PENDING</span>
      </div>
      <div class="tk-body">
        <div class="tk-row"><span class="tk-lbl">NAME</span><span class="tk-val" id="tkName">—</span></div>
        <div class="tk-row"><span class="tk-lbl">EVENT</span><span class="tk-val" id="tkEvt">—</span></div>
        <div class="tk-row"><span class="tk-lbl">DATE</span><span class="tk-val" id="tkDate">—</span></div>
        <div class="tk-row"><span class="tk-lbl">GUESTS</span><span class="tk-val" id="tkCount">—</span></div>
        <hr class="tk-div">
      </div>
      <!-- QR only shown when approved -->
      <div class="qr-zone" id="qrZone" style="display:none">
        <div class="qr-wrap" id="qrWrap"></div>
        <div class="qr-id" id="qrId">—</div>
        <div class="qr-badge">⚡ SINGLE USE QR</div>
      </div>
      <!-- Pending message -->
      <div id="pendingZone" style="background:#050505;padding:22px;text-align:center">
        <div style="font-family:var(--fm);font-size:9px;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:1px;line-height:2">
          QR ticket will appear here<br>once your reservation is approved.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ADMIN LOGIN -->

<div class="screen" id="s-admin-login">
  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:100%;padding:40px 28px;text-align:center">
    <div style="font-family:var(--fd);font-size:42px;letter-spacing:4px;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px">ADMIN</div>
    <div style="font-family:var(--fm);font-size:9px;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:36px">NOT IN PARIS</div>
    <div style="width:100%;max-width:300px">
      <div class="f"><label>Username</label><input type="text" id="adminUser" placeholder="admin" autocomplete="off"></div>
      <div class="f"><label>Password</label><input type="password" id="adminPw" placeholder="••••••••" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')doAdminLogin()"></div>
      <div class="err-msg" id="adminLoginErr"></div>
      <button class="btn" onclick="doAdminLogin()">SIGN IN</button>
      <div class="link-txt" style="margin-top:12px" onclick="G('s-login')">← Back</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ADMIN -->

<div class="screen" id="s-admin">
  <div class="admin-nav">
    <span class="admin-title">ADMIN</span>
    <div class="live-row"><span class="live-dot"></span><span class="live-txt">LIVE</span></div>
    <button class="nb" onclick="G('s-land')">← EXIT</button>
    <span class="admin-badge">ADMIN</span>
  </div>
  <div class="a-tabs">
    <button class="a-tab active" onclick="aTab('ov')">OVERVIEW</button>
    <button class="a-tab" onclick="aTab('mb')">MEMBERS</button>
    <button class="a-tab" onclick="aTab('ev')">EVENTS</button>
    <button class="a-tab" onclick="aTab('rs')">RESERVATIONS</button>
    <button class="a-tab" onclick="aTab('qr')">QR SCAN</button>
  </div>

  <div class="a-panel active" id="ap-ov">
    <div class="stats-row" id="admStats"></div>
    <div class="sec">RECENT APPLICATIONS</div><div id="recM"></div>
    <div class="hr"></div>
    <div class="sec">RECENT RESERVATIONS</div><div id="recR"></div>
    <div class="hr"></div>
    <div class="sec">BRANDING</div>
    <div class="add-wrap">
      <div class="sec" style="font-size:11px;margin-bottom:6px">SLOGAN</div>
      <input type="text" class="ai" id="sloganTxt" placeholder="e.g. MEMBERS ONLY" style="margin-bottom:8px">
      <button class="ab" onclick="saveBranding()">SAVE BRANDING</button>
    </div>
    <div class="sec">ANNOUNCEMENT</div>
    <textarea class="at2" id="annTxt" style="height:80px"></textarea>
    <button class="ab" onclick="saveAnn()">UPDATE ANNOUNCEMENT</button>
    <div class="hr"></div>
    <div class="sec">ADMIN CREDENTIALS</div>
    <div class="add-wrap">
      <input type="text" class="ai" id="newAdminUser" placeholder="New username">
      <input type="password" class="ai" id="newAdminPw" placeholder="New password">
      <button class="ab sec" onclick="saveAdminCreds()">UPDATE CREDENTIALS</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="a-panel" id="ap-mb">
    <div class="stats-row" id="mStats"></div>
    <div class="chs" id="mChips">
      <button class="ch active" onclick="setMC(this,'')">ALL</button>
      <button class="ch p" onclick="setMC(this,'pending')">PENDING</button>
      <button class="ch a" onclick="setMC(this,'approved')">APPROVED</button>
      <button class="ch" onclick="setMC(this,'rejected')">REJECTED</button>
    </div>
    <div id="mList"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="a-panel" id="ap-ev">
    <div class="sec">ADD NEW EVENT</div>
    <div class="add-wrap">
      <div class="uz" id="uZone"><input type="file" accept="image/*" onchange="onPoster(event)">
        <div style="font-size:24px;margin-bottom:4px">🖼️</div>
        <div style="font-family:var(--fm);font-size:8px;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:1px">UPLOAD POSTER · 4:5</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pp" id="pPrev"><img id="pPrevImg"><button class="pp-rm" onclick="rmP()">✕</button></div>
      <input type="text" class="ai" id="neName" placeholder="Artist name">
      <input type="text" class="ai" id="neGenre" placeholder="Music genre (e.g. Techno · House)">
      <input type="text" class="ai" id="neSub" placeholder="Subtitle (e.g. DANCE TILL THEY COME #71)">
      <div class="ag"><input type="date" class="ai" id="neDate"><input type="time" class="ai" id="neTime" value="22:00"></div>
      <input type="number" class="ai" id="neCap" placeholder="Capacity" min="1" value="100">
      <div class="sec" style="margin-top:8px;margin-bottom:6px">EVENT RULES</div>
      <div class="rules-admin-box"><textarea id="neRules" class="at2" style="height:70px" placeholder="Event rules — guests must accept before reserving (optional)"></textarea></div>
      <button class="ab" id="addEvtBtn" onclick="addEvt()">CREATE EVENT</button>
    </div>
    <div class="sec">CURRENT EVENTS</div>
    <div id="evtList"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="a-panel" id="ap-rs">
    <div class="fr" style="margin-bottom:8px">
      <select id="filterEvt" onchange="renderRes()"><option value="">All Events</option></select>
      <button class="ab sec" style="width:38px;padding:0;flex-shrink:0;font-size:15px;margin:0" onclick="renderRes()">↻</button>
    </div>
    <div class="chs" id="rChips">
      <button class="ch active" onclick="setRC(this,'')">ALL</button>
      <button class="ch p" onclick="setRC(this,'pending')">PENDING</button>
      <button class="ch a" onclick="setRC(this,'approved')">APPROVED</button>
      <button class="ch" onclick="setRC(this,'rejected')">REJECTED</button>
      <button class="ch" onclick="setRC(this,'used')">USED</button>
    </div>
    <div id="rList"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="a-panel" id="ap-qr">
    <!-- Camera -->
    <div style="background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid var(--mid);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:12px">
      <video id="qrVideo" style="width:100%;aspect-ratio:1/1;object-fit:cover;display:none;background:#000"></video>
      <canvas id="qrCanvas" style="display:none"></canvas>
      <div id="camOff" style="padding:28px 16px;text-align:center">
        <div style="font-size:44px;margin-bottom:10px">📷</div>
        <div style="font-family:var(--fm);font-size:8px;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:14px">TAP TO OPEN CAMERA</div>
        <button class="qr-go" style="width:100%;padding:14px;font-size:15px" onclick="startCam()">OPEN CAMERA</button>
      </div>
      <div id="camOn" style="display:none;padding:10px 16px;text-align:center">
        <div style="font-family:var(--fm);font-size:9px;color:var(--green);letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:8px;animation:pulse 1s infinite">● SCANNING FOR QR CODE...</div>
        <button class="qr-go" style="background:var(--red);color:#fff;width:100%;padding:12px;font-size:13px" onclick="stopCam()">✕ STOP CAMERA</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Manual -->
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin:12px 0;font-family:var(--fm);font-size:8px;color:#2a2a2a;letter-spacing:2px">
      <div style="flex:1;height:1px;background:#1a1a1a"></div>OR ENTER MANUALLY<div style="flex:1;height:1px;background:#1a1a1a"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="qr-inp-row">
      <input type="text" id="qrInput" placeholder="NIP-XXXXXX" maxlength="12" oninput="this.value=this.value.toUpperCase()" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')scanQR()">
      <button class="qr-go" onclick="scanQR()">CHECK</button>
    </div>
    <div class="qr-res" id="qrRes"></div>
    <div style="font-family:var(--fm);font-size:7px;color:#1a1a1a;letter-spacing:1px;text-align:center;line-height:2.5;margin-top:8px">Each QR code can only be used once.</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="toast" id="toastEl"></div>
</div><!-- /app -->

<script>
const SB = supabase.createClient('https://diqparjrtvvfxvwxebov.supabase.co', 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImRpcXBhcmpydHZ2Znh2d3hlYm92Iiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzM5Mzc3OTMsImV4cCI6MjA4OTUxMzc5M30.pNI2yU6LDG8583HBPq-5puxkpEVEAYwhGp9ibJ1WBsI');

const INIT_EVENTS = [];

// State
let me = null, events = [], selEvt = null, cnt = 2, ci = 0, sx = 0, drag = false;
let refM = null, mF = '', rF = '', newP = null, resSub = null;

// ── NAVIGATION ──
function G(id) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
  const app = document.getElementById('app');
  if (app) app.scrollTop = 0;
}

// ── BOOT ──
async function boot() {
  const p = new URLSearchParams(location.search);
  const ref = p.get('ref');
  if (ref) {
    document.getElementById('refInput').value = ref;
    checkRef(ref);
    G('s-register');
    return;
  }
  const saved = localStorage.getItem('nip_me');
  if (saved) {
    try {
      const { data } = await SB.from('members').select('*').eq('id', saved).eq('status', 'approved').single();
      if (data) { me = data; enterCustomer(); return; }
    } catch(e) {}
    localStorage.removeItem('nip_me');
  }
  // Load branding from settings
  loadBranding();
}

// ── REGISTER ──
let refTimer;
async function checkRef(v) {
  clearTimeout(refTimer);
  const ok = document.getElementById('refOk'), er = document.getElementById('refErr');
  ok.style.display = 'none'; er.style.display = 'none'; refM = null;
  if (v.length < 10) return;
  refTimer = setTimeout(async () => {
    const { data } = await SB.from('members').select('*').eq('member_code', v).eq('status', 'approved').single();
    if (data) {
      if ((data.referral_used || 0) >= (data.referral_limit || 3)) {
        er.textContent = '✕ This referral code has reached its limit (3/3)';
        er.style.display = 'block'; refM = null;
      } else {
        refM = data;
        ok.textContent = '✓ Referral found: ' + data.name + ' (' + ((data.referral_limit||3)-(data.referral_used||0)) + ' uses left)';
        ok.style.display = 'block';
      }
    } else {
      er.textContent = '✕ Invalid referral code';
      er.style.display = 'block';
    }
  }, 400);
}

async function doRegister() {
  const name = document.getElementById('regName').value.trim();
  const email = document.getElementById('regEmail').value.trim().toLowerCase();
  const pw = document.getElementById('regPw').value;
  const phone = document.getElementById('regPhone').value.trim();
  const insta = document.getElementById('regInsta').value.trim();
  const refCode = document.getElementById('refInput').value.trim().toUpperCase();
  const err = document.getElementById('regErr'); err.textContent = '';

  if (!name || !email || !pw || !phone) { err.textContent = 'Name, email, password and phone are required'; return; }
  if (!refCode) { err.textContent = 'Referral code is required'; return; }
  if (!refM) { err.textContent = 'Please enter a valid referral code'; return; }
  if (pw.length < 8) { err.textContent = 'Password must be at least 8 characters'; return; }

  const btn = document.getElementById('regBtn'); btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'SENDING...';

  // Hash password client-side (simple, for demo - in production use Supabase Auth)
  const pwHash = btoa(pw + email);

  const { data: existing } = await SB.from('members').select('id').eq('email', email).single();
  if (existing) { err.textContent = 'This email is already registered'; btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'APPLY'; return; }

  const { error } = await SB.from('members').insert({
    name, email, password_hash: pwHash, phone,
    instagram: insta || null,
    ref_code: refCode || null,
    ref_by: refM?.name || null,
    ref_by_id: refM?.id || null,
    status: 'pending',
    referral_limit: 3,
    referral_used: 0
  });

  btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'APPLY';
  if (error) { err.textContent = 'Error: ' + error.message; return; }

  // If referred, increment referral_used on referrer
  if (refM) {
    await SB.from('members').update({ referral_used: (refM.referral_used || 0) + 1 }).eq('id', refM.id);
  }

  G('s-pending');
}

// ── LOGIN ──
async function doLogin() {
  const email = document.getElementById('loginEmail').value.trim().toLowerCase();
  const pw = document.getElementById('loginPw').value;
  const err = document.getElementById('loginErr'); err.textContent = '';
  if (!email || !pw) { err.textContent = 'Email and password are required'; return; }

  const btn = document.getElementById('loginBtn'); btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'SIGNING IN...';
  const pwHash = btoa(pw + email);

  const { data } = await SB.from('members').select('*').eq('email', email).eq('password_hash', pwHash).single();
  btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'SIGN IN';

  if (!data) { err.textContent = 'Invalid email or password'; return; }
  if (data.status === 'pending') { err.textContent = 'Your application is still under review'; return; }
  if (data.status === 'rejected') { err.textContent = 'Your application was not approved'; return; }

  localStorage.setItem('nip_me', data.id);
  me = data;
  enterCustomer();
}

function doLogout() {
  localStorage.removeItem('nip_me');
  me = null; selEvt = null; cnt = 2; events = [];
  G('s-land');
}

function showCode() { toast('Your code: ' + (me?.member_code || 'Not assigned yet')); }

async function enterCustomer() {
  document.getElementById('mbName').textContent = me.name;
  document.getElementById('memberCodeBtn').textContent = '🎫 ' + (me.member_code || '—');
  document.getElementById('fName').value = me.name;
  document.getElementById('fPhone').value = me.phone || '';
  const used = me.referral_used || 0, limit = me.referral_limit || 3;
  document.getElementById('refCount').textContent = (limit - used) + ' referrals left';
  await loadEvents();
  await loadAnn();
  G('s-customer');
}

function copyRef() {
  if (!me?.member_code) { toast('No referral code assigned yet'); return; }
  const url = location.href.split('?')[0] + '?ref=' + me.member_code;
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(() => toast('Referral link copied ✓'));
}

// ── EVENTS ──
async function loadEvents() {
  const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
  const { data } = await SB.from('events').select('*').gte('date', today).order('date', { ascending: true });
  if (data && data.length) {
    events = data.map(e => ({ ...e, poster: e.poster_b64 || getPoster(e.name) }));
  } else {
    // fallback to embedded + filter future
    events = INIT_EVENTS.filter(e => e.date >= today).sort((a,b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date));
  }
  renderCarousel();
}

function getPoster(name) {
  const u = (name || '').toUpperCase();
  const ev = INIT_EVENTS.find(e => u.includes(e.name.toUpperCase()));
  return ev ? ev.poster : null;
}

function renderCarousel() {
  const tr = document.getElementById('cTrack'), dt = document.getElementById('dots');
  tr.innerHTML = ''; dt.innerHTML = ''; ci = 0;
  if (!events.length) {
    tr.innerHTML = '<div class="empty" style="width:calc(100vw - 60px)">No upcoming events.</div>';
    return;
  }
  events.forEach((e, i) => {
    const c = document.createElement('div');
    c.className = 'pc' + (selEvt === e.id ? ' sel' : '');
    c.dataset.id = e.id; c.onclick = () => selE(e.id);
    const poster = e.poster || e.poster_b64 || getPoster(e.name);
    c.innerHTML = (poster ? `<img src="${poster}" draggable="false">` :
      `<div style="width:100%;aspect-ratio:4/5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:#0d0d0d"><span style="font-family:var(--fd);font-size:24px;color:#2a2a2a">${e.name}</span></div>`)
      + `<div class="pc-meta"><div class="pc-name">${e.name}</div><div class="pc-row">${e.genre ? `<span class="pc-genre">${e.genre}</span>` : ''}<span class="pc-date">${fmtDate(e.date)} · ${e.time || ''}</span></div></div><div class="pc-sel"></div><div class="pc-chk">✓</div>`;
    tr.appendChild(c);
    const d = document.createElement('div');
    d.className = 'dot' + (i === 0 ? ' active' : '');
    d.onclick = () => { ci = i; updC(); };
    dt.appendChild(d);
  });
  updC(false); setupSwipe();
}

function updC(a = true) {
  const tr = document.getElementById('cTrack'), cs = tr.querySelectorAll('.pc');
  if (!cs.length) return;
  const cw = cs[0].offsetWidth + 10;
  tr.style.transition = a ? 'transform .42s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)' : 'none';
  tr.style.transform = `translateX(-${ci * cw}px)`;
  document.querySelectorAll('.dot').forEach((d, i) => d.classList.toggle('active', i === ci));
}

function setupSwipe() {
  const vp = document.getElementById('cVP');
  vp.ontouchstart = e => { sx = e.touches[0].clientX; drag = true; };
  vp.ontouchmove = e => { if (drag) e.preventDefault(); };
  vp.ontouchend = e => {
    if (!drag) return; drag = false;
    const dx = e.changedTouches[0].clientX - sx;
    if (dx < -40 && ci < events.length - 1) ci++;
    else if (dx > 40 && ci > 0) ci--;
    updC();
  };
  vp.onmousedown = e => { sx = e.clientX; drag = true; };
  window.onmouseup = e => {
    if (!drag) return; drag = false;
    const dx = e.clientX - sx;
    if (Math.abs(dx) > 40) { if (dx < 0 && ci < events.length - 1) ci++; else if (dx > 0 && ci > 0) ci--; updC(); }
  };
}

function selE(id) {
  selEvt = id;
  const e = events.find(x => x.id === id);
  document.querySelectorAll('.pc').forEach(c => c.classList.toggle('sel', c.dataset.id === id));
  const h = document.getElementById('cHint'); h.textContent = '✓ ' + e.name + ' selected'; h.className = 'c-hint ok';
  document.getElementById('evtSelNone').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('evtSelDot').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('evtSelTxt').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('evtSelTxt').innerHTML = e.name + '<br><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--dim)">' + fmtDate(e.date) + ' · ' + (e.time || '') + '</span>';
  // Show event note
  const note = document.getElementById('evtNote');
  if (e.note) { note.textContent = 'ℹ ' + e.note; note.style.display = 'block'; } else note.style.display = 'none';
  // Show rules checkbox
  const rulesBox = document.getElementById('rulesBox');
  const rulesText = document.getElementById('rulesText');
  const rulesCheck = document.getElementById('rulesCheck');
  rulesCheck.checked = false;
  if (e.rules) {
    rulesText.textContent = e.rules;
    rulesBox.style.display = 'block';
  } else {
    rulesBox.style.display = 'none';
  }
}

function chgCnt(d) { cnt = Math.max(1, Math.min(20, cnt + d)); document.getElementById('cntVal').textContent = cnt; }

// ── RESERVATION ──
async function doRes() {
  const name = document.getElementById('fName').value.trim();
  const phone = document.getElementById('fPhone').value.trim();
  const note = document.getElementById('fNote').value.trim();
  if (!selEvt) { toast('Please select an event'); return; }
  if (!name) { toast('Full name is required'); return; }
  if (!phone) { toast('Phone is required'); return; }

  // Check rules accepted
  const rulesBox = document.getElementById('rulesBox');
  const rulesCheck = document.getElementById('rulesCheck');
  if (rulesBox.style.display !== 'none' && !rulesCheck.checked) {
    toast('Please accept the event rules to continue');
    rulesBox.style.border = '1px solid var(--red)';
    setTimeout(() => rulesBox.style.border = '1px solid #1a1a1a', 2000);
    return;
  }

  const e = events.find(x => x.id === selEvt);
  const qrId = 'NIP-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 6).toUpperCase();
  const btn = document.getElementById('subBtn'); btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'SENDING...';

  const { data, error } = await SB.from('reservations').insert({
    qr_id: qrId, event_id: e.id, event_name: e.name,
    event_date: e.date, event_time: e.time,
    name, phone, count: cnt, note, status: 'pending',
    member_id: me.id, member_code: me.member_code,
    rules_accepted: rulesCheck.checked
  }).select().single();

  btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'REQUEST RESERVATION';
  if (error) { toast('Error: ' + error.message); return; }
  showTicket(data);
}

function showTicket(r) {
  document.getElementById('tkName').textContent = r.name;
  document.getElementById('tkEvt').textContent = r.event_name;
  document.getElementById('tkDate').textContent = fmtDate(r.event_date) + ' · ' + (r.event_time || '');
  document.getElementById('tkCount').textContent = r.count + ' guest' + (r.count > 1 ? 's' : '');
  document.getElementById('qrId').textContent = r.qr_id;
  const w = document.getElementById('qrWrap'); w.innerHTML = '';
  new QRCode(w, { text: r.qr_id, width: 160, height: 160, colorDark: '#000', colorLight: '#fff', correctLevel: QRCode.CorrectLevel.M });
  setTkStatus(r.status);
  // Listen for approval
  if (resSub) SB.removeChannel(resSub);
  resSub = SB.channel('res-' + r.id)
    .on('postgres_changes', { event: 'UPDATE', schema: 'public', table: 'reservations', filter: 'id=eq.' + r.id }, p => {
      setTkStatus(p.new.status);
      if (p.new.status === 'approved') toast('🎉 Your reservation has been approved!');
    }).subscribe();
  G('s-ticket');
}

function setTkStatus(s) {
  const st = document.getElementById('tkStatus'), b = document.getElementById('tkBadge');
  const qrZone = document.getElementById('qrZone');
  const pendingZone = document.getElementById('pendingZone');
  st.className = 'tk-status ' + s;
  if (s === 'approved') {
    st.innerHTML = '✓ APPROVED — Show this QR at the door.';
    b.textContent = 'APPROVED'; b.style.background = 'var(--green)'; b.style.color = '#fff';
    if (qrZone) qrZone.style.display = 'flex';
    if (pendingZone) pendingZone.style.display = 'none';
  } else if (s === 'rejected') {
    st.innerHTML = '✕ REJECTED — No spot available this time.';
    b.textContent = 'REJECTED'; b.style.background = 'var(--red)'; b.style.color = '#fff';
    if (qrZone) qrZone.style.display = 'none';
    if (pendingZone) pendingZone.style.display = 'block';
  } else {
    st.innerHTML = '⏳ PENDING — Your reservation is being reviewed.';
    b.textContent = 'PENDING'; b.style.background = 'var(--gold)'; b.style.color = '#000';
    if (qrZone) qrZone.style.display = 'none';
    if (pendingZone) pendingZone.style.display = 'block';
  }
}

function goBackRes() {
  selEvt = null; cnt = 2;
  document.getElementById('cntVal').textContent = '2';
  document.getElementById('fNote').value = '';
  document.getElementById('evtSelNone').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('evtSelDot').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('evtSelTxt').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('evtNote').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('rulesBox').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('cHint').textContent = 'Tap an event to make a reservation ↑';
  document.getElementById('cHint').className = 'c-hint';
  renderCarousel();
  G('s-customer');
}

// ── ADMIN ──
function goAdmin() {
  renderAdminStats(); renderRecM(); renderRecR(); loadAnn();
  loadBranding();
  SB.from('settings').select('value').eq('key','slogan').single().then(({data}) => {
    if (data) { const el=document.getElementById('sloganTxt'); if(el) el.value=data.value; }
  });
  G('s-admin');
}

async function doAdminLogin() {
  const user = document.getElementById('adminUser').value.trim();
  const pw = document.getElementById('adminPw').value;
  const err = document.getElementById('adminLoginErr'); err.textContent = '';
  if (!user || !pw) { err.textContent = 'Enter username and password'; return; }
  // Check against settings table
  const { data } = await SB.from('settings').select('value').eq('key','admin_credentials').single();
  let creds = { username: 'admin', password: 'nip2024' }; // default
  if (data?.value) { try { creds = JSON.parse(data.value); } catch(e) {} }
  if (user !== creds.username || pw !== creds.password) {
    err.textContent = 'Invalid username or password'; return;
  }
  goAdmin();
}

function aTab(t) {
  const tabs = ['ov', 'mb', 'ev', 'rs', 'qr'];
  document.querySelectorAll('.a-tab').forEach((x, i) => x.classList.toggle('active', tabs[i] === t));
  document.querySelectorAll('.a-panel').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('ap-' + t).classList.add('active');
  if (t === 'ov') { renderAdminStats(); renderRecM(); renderRecR(); }
  if (t === 'mb') { renderMStats(); renderM(); }
  if (t === 'ev') renderEvts();
  if (t === 'rs') { renderRes(); popFilter(); }
  if (t !== 'qr') stopCam();
}

async function renderAdminStats() {
  const [{ data: ms }, { data: rs }] = await Promise.all([
    SB.from('members').select('status'),
    SB.from('reservations').select('status')
  ]);
  const pM = (ms||[]).filter(m => m.status === 'pending').length;
  const aM = (ms||[]).filter(m => m.status === 'approved').length;
  const pR = (rs||[]).filter(r => r.status === 'pending').length;
  document.getElementById('admStats').innerHTML = `
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-n gold">${pM}</div><div class="stat-l">PENDING MEMBERS</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-n g">${aM}</div><div class="stat-l">APPROVED</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-n o">${pR}</div><div class="stat-l">PENDING RES.</div></div>`;
}

async function renderMStats() {
  const { data } = await SB.from('members').select('status');
  if (!data) return;
  document.getElementById('mStats').innerHTML = `
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-n gold">${data.filter(m => m.status==='pending').length}</div><div class="stat-l">PENDING</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-n g">${data.filter(m => m.status==='approved').length}</div><div class="stat-l">APPROVED</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-n b">${data.length}</div><div class="stat-l">TOTAL</div></div>`;
}

async function renderRecM() { const { data } = await SB.from('members').select('*').order('created_at', { ascending: false }).limit(5); renderMCards(data||[], 'recM'); }
async function renderM() {
  let q = SB.from('members').select('*').order('created_at', { ascending: false });
  if (mF) q = q.eq('status', mF);
  const { data } = await q; renderMCards(data||[], 'mList');
}

function renderMCards(list, cid) {
  const el = document.getElementById(cid);
  if (!list.length) { el.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">No records found.</div>'; return; }
  el.innerHTML = '';
  list.forEach(m => {
    const bc = { pending:'p', approved:'a', rejected:'r', frozen:'u' }[m.status] || 'u';
    const bt = { pending:'PENDING', approved:'APPROVED', rejected:'REJECTED', frozen:'FROZEN' }[m.status] || m.status?.toUpperCase();
    const d = document.createElement('div'); d.className = 'card';
    const refInfo = m.ref_by ? `Referred by: ${m.ref_by}` : 'Direct application';
    const refUsed = `Referrals used: ${m.referral_used||0}/${m.referral_limit||3}`;
    d.innerHTML = `
      <div class="card-h" onclick="this.nextElementSibling.classList.toggle('open')">
        <div style="flex:1;min-width:0">
          <div class="card-name">${m.name}</div>
          <div class="card-meta">${m.email||''} · ${m.phone||''}<br>${refInfo}</div>
        </div>
        <span class="bdg ${bc}">${bt}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="card-b">
        ${m.status==='pending' ? `<button class="act-btn approve" onclick="appM('${m.id}')">✓ APPROVE</button><button class="act-btn reject" onclick="rejM('${m.id}')">✕ REJECT</button>` : ''}
        ${m.status==='approved' ? `<button class="act-btn reject" onclick="freezeM('${m.id}')">❄️ FREEZE</button>` : ''}
        ${m.status==='frozen' ? `<button class="act-btn approve" onclick="appM('${m.id}')">▶ UNFREEZE</button>` : ''}
        <button class="act-btn reject" style="background:rgba(255,0,0,.07);border-color:rgba(255,0,0,.2)" onclick="deleteM('${m.id}','${m.name}')">🗑 DELETE</button>
        ${m.member_code ? `<div class="member-code-box">${m.member_code}</div>` : ''}
        <div class="card-det">📞 ${m.phone||'—'}<br>📸 ${m.instagram||'—'}<br>🔗 ${refInfo}<br>🎟 ${refUsed}${m.ref_by ? `<br>👤 Referred by: <strong>${m.ref_by}</strong>` : ''}</div>
        ${m.status==='approved' ? `
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 0;border-top:1px solid #1a1a1a">
          <span style="font-family:var(--fm);font-size:8px;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:1px;flex:1">REFERRAL LIMIT</span>
          <button onclick="chgRefLimit('${m.id}',${m.referral_limit||3},-1)" style="width:28px;height:28px;background:#1a1a1a;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;color:var(--white);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;font-size:16px">−</button>
          <span style="font-family:var(--fm);font-size:12px;color:var(--white);min-width:24px;text-align:center">${m.referral_limit||3}</span>
          <button onclick="chgRefLimit('${m.id}',${m.referral_limit||3},1)" style="width:28px;height:28px;background:#1a1a1a;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;color:var(--white);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;font-size:16px">+</button>
        </div>` : ''}
      </div>`;
    el.appendChild(d);
  });
}

function genCode() { return 'NIP-MBR-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 6).toUpperCase(); }

async function freezeM(id) {
  await SB.from('members').update({ status: 'frozen' }).eq('id', id);
  toast('Member frozen ❄️'); renderMStats(); renderM();
}

async function deleteM(id, name) {
  if (!confirm('Delete "'+name+'"? This cannot be undone.')) return;
  await SB.from('members').delete().eq('id', id);
  toast(name+' deleted 🗑'); renderMStats(); renderM(); renderAdminStats();
}

async function chgRefLimit(id, current, delta) {
  const newLimit = Math.max(0, current + delta);
  await SB.from('members').update({ referral_limit: newLimit }).eq('id', id);
  toast('Referral limit → ' + newLimit);
  renderM();
}

async function appM(id) {
  const code = genCode();
  await SB.from('members').update({ status: 'approved', member_code: code }).eq('id', id);
  toast('Approved → ' + code); renderMStats(); renderM(); renderAdminStats();
}
async function rejM(id) {
  await SB.from('members').update({ status: 'rejected' }).eq('id', id);
  toast('Rejected'); renderM();
}
function setMC(el, s) { document.querySelectorAll('#mChips .ch').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active')); el.classList.add('active'); mF = s; renderM(); }

// ── EVENTS ADMIN ──
async function renderEvts() {
  const { data } = await SB.from('events').select('*').order('date', { ascending: true });
  const list = document.getElementById('evtList'); list.innerHTML = '';
  if (!data?.length) { list.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">No events yet.</div>'; return; }
  const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
  data.forEach(e => {
    const pct = Math.round(((e.approved_count||0) / e.capacity) * 100);
    const poster = e.poster_b64 || getPoster(e.name);
    const isPast = e.date < today;
    const d = document.createElement('div'); d.className = 'ec';
    if (isPast) d.style.opacity = '0.4';
    d.innerHTML = `
      <div class="et">
        <div class="eth">${poster ? `<img src="${poster}">` : `<div class="eth-ph"><span>${e.name.slice(0,4)}</span></div>`}</div>
        <div class="ei">
          <div class="ei-name">${e.name}${isPast ? ' <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--dim)">(past)</span>' : ''}</div>
          ${e.genre ? `<div class="ei-genre">${e.genre}</div>` : ''}
          <div class="ei-date">${fmtDate(e.date)} · ${e.time||''}</div>
          <div class="cap-row"><div class="cap-bg"><div class="cap-fill ${pct>80?'full':pct>60?'warn':''}" style="width:${pct}%"></div></div><span class="cap-txt">${e.approved_count||0}/${e.capacity}</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="e-acts">
        <button class="e-act" onclick="updEvtP('${e.id}')">🖼</button>
        <button class="e-act" onclick="editEvt('${e.id}')">✏️ EDIT</button>
        <button class="e-act" onclick="editRules('${e.id}')">📋 RULES</button>
        <button class="e-act del" onclick="delEvt('${e.id}','${e.name}')">✕ DELETE</button>
      </div>`;
    list.appendChild(d);
  });
}

function onPoster(e) { const f = e.target.files[0]; if (!f) return; const r = new FileReader(); r.onload = ev => { newP = ev.target.result; document.getElementById('pPrev').style.display='block'; document.getElementById('pPrevImg').src=newP; document.getElementById('uZone').style.display='none'; toast('Poster uploaded ✓'); }; r.readAsDataURL(f); }
function rmP() { newP=null; document.getElementById('pPrev').style.display='none'; document.getElementById('uZone').style.display='block'; }

async function updEvtP(id) {
  const i = document.createElement('input'); i.type='file'; i.accept='image/*';
  i.onchange = async e => { const f=e.target.files[0]; if(!f)return; const r=new FileReader(); r.onload=async ev=>{await SB.from('events').update({poster_b64:ev.target.result}).eq('id',id); toast('Poster updated ✓'); renderEvts(); }; r.readAsDataURL(f); };
  i.click();
}

async function editRules(id) {
  const { data: ev } = await SB.from('events').select('rules,name').eq('id', id).single();
  const n = prompt('Event rules for ' + (ev?.name||'') + ' (guests must accept):', ev?.rules||'');
  if (n === null) return;
  await SB.from('events').update({ rules: n }).eq('id', id);
  toast('Rules updated ✓'); renderEvts();
}

async function editNote(id) {
  const { data: ev } = await SB.from('events').select('note,name').eq('id', id).single();
  const n = prompt('Note for ' + (ev?.name||'') + ':', ev?.note||'');
  if (n === null) return;
  await SB.from('events').update({ note: n }).eq('id', id);
  toast('Note updated ✓'); renderEvts();
}

async function addEvt() {
  const name = document.getElementById('neName').value.trim().toUpperCase();
  const genre = document.getElementById('neGenre').value.trim();
  const sub = document.getElementById('neSub').value.trim().toUpperCase();
  const date = document.getElementById('neDate').value;
  const time = document.getElementById('neTime').value;
  const cap = parseInt(document.getElementById('neCap').value);
  const rules = document.getElementById('neRules').value.trim();
  if (!name || !date || !cap) { toast('Name, date and capacity are required'); return; }
  const btn = document.getElementById('addEvtBtn'); btn.disabled=true; btn.textContent='CREATING...';
  const { error } = await SB.from('events').insert({ name, genre, subtitle:sub, date, time, capacity:cap, approved_count:0, poster_b64:newP, rules });
  btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent='CREATE EVENT';
  if (error) { toast('Error: '+error.message); return; }
  ['neName','neGenre','neSub','neDate','neRules'].forEach(id => document.getElementById(id).value='');
  document.getElementById('neCap').value='100'; rmP();
  toast('"'+name+'" created ✓'); renderEvts();
}

async function delEvt(id, name) {
  if (!confirm('Delete "'+name+'"?')) return;
  await SB.from('events').delete().eq('id', id);
  toast(name+' deleted'); renderEvts();
}

async function editEvt(id) {
  const { data: e } = await SB.from('events').select('*').eq('id', id).single();
  if (!e) return;
  // Fill the add form with existing data
  document.getElementById('neName').value = e.name || '';
  document.getElementById('neGenre').value = e.genre || '';
  document.getElementById('neSub').value = e.subtitle || '';
  document.getElementById('neDate').value = e.date || '';
  document.getElementById('neTime').value = e.time || '';
  document.getElementById('neCap').value = e.capacity || 100;
  document.getElementById('neRules').value = e.rules || '';
  // Show poster if exists
  if (e.poster_b64) {
    newP = e.poster_b64;
    document.getElementById('pPrev').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('pPrevImg').src = e.poster_b64;
    document.getElementById('uZone').style.display = 'none';
  }
  // Change button to update mode
  const btn = document.getElementById('addEvtBtn');
  btn.textContent = 'UPDATE EVENT';
  btn.onclick = () => updateEvt(id);
  // Scroll to top of events panel
  document.getElementById('ap-ev').scrollTop = 0;
  toast('Edit mode — make changes and tap UPDATE EVENT');
}

async function updateEvt(id) {
  const name = document.getElementById('neName').value.trim().toUpperCase();
  const genre = document.getElementById('neGenre').value.trim();
  const sub = document.getElementById('neSub').value.trim().toUpperCase();
  const date = document.getElementById('neDate').value;
  const time = document.getElementById('neTime').value;
  const cap = parseInt(document.getElementById('neCap').value);
  const rules = document.getElementById('neRules').value.trim();
  if (!name || !date || !cap) { toast('Name, date and capacity are required'); return; }
  const btn = document.getElementById('addEvtBtn'); btn.disabled=true; btn.textContent='UPDATING...';
  const updateData = { name, genre, subtitle:sub, date, time, capacity:cap, rules };
  if (newP) updateData.poster_b64 = newP;
  await SB.from('events').update(updateData).eq('id', id);
  btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent='CREATE EVENT';
  btn.onclick = () => addEvt();
  ['neName','neGenre','neSub','neDate','neRules'].forEach(id => document.getElementById(id).value='');
  document.getElementById('neCap').value='100'; rmP();
  toast('"'+name+'" updated ✓'); renderEvts();
}

// ── RESERVATIONS ──
async function popFilter() {
  const { data } = await SB.from('events').select('id,name,date').order('date');
  const fe = document.getElementById('filterEvt');
  fe.innerHTML = '<option value="">All Events</option>';
  (data||[]).forEach(e => fe.innerHTML += `<option value="${e.id}">${e.name} — ${fmtDate(e.date)}</option>`);
}

async function renderRecR() { const { data } = await SB.from('reservations').select('*').order('created_at',{ascending:false}).limit(6); renderRCards(data||[],'recR'); }
async function renderRes() {
  const filter = document.getElementById('filterEvt').value;
  const list = document.getElementById('rList'); list.innerHTML='<div class="spin"></div>';
  let q = SB.from('reservations').select('*').order('created_at',{ascending:false});
  if (filter) q = q.eq('event_id', filter);
  if (rF) q = q.eq('status', rF);
  const { data } = await q; renderRCards(data||[], 'rList');
}

function renderRCards(list, cid) {
  const el = document.getElementById(cid);
  if (!list.length) { el.innerHTML='<div class="empty">No records.</div>'; return; }
  el.innerHTML='';
  list.forEach(r => {
    const bc = {pending:'p',approved:'a',rejected:'r',used:'u'}[r.status];
    const bt = {pending:'PENDING',approved:'APPROVED',rejected:'REJECTED',used:'USED'}[r.status];
    const d = document.createElement('div'); d.className='card';
    d.innerHTML = `
      <div class="card-h" onclick="this.nextElementSibling.classList.toggle('open')">
        <div style="flex:1;min-width:0">
          <div class="card-name">${r.name}</div>
          <div class="card-meta">${r.event_name} · ${r.count} guest${r.count>1?'s':''} · ${r.member_code||''}<br>${r.phone}</div>
        </div>
        <span class="bdg ${bc}">${bt}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="card-b">
        ${r.status==='pending' ? `<button class="act-btn approve" onclick="appR('${r.id}','${r.event_id}',${r.count})">✓ APPROVE</button><button class="act-btn reject" onclick="rejR('${r.id}')">✕ REJECT</button>` : ''}
        <div class="card-det">📞 ${r.phone}${r.note?'<br>📝 '+r.note:''}<br>🎟 ${r.qr_id}<br>📅 ${fmtDate(r.event_date)}<br>✅ Rules accepted: ${r.rules_accepted?'Yes':'No'}</div>
      </div>`;
    el.appendChild(d);
  });
}

async function appR(id, evtId, count) {
  await SB.from('reservations').update({status:'approved'}).eq('id',id);
  const {data:ev} = await SB.from('events').select('approved_count').eq('id',evtId).single();
  if (ev) await SB.from('events').update({approved_count:(ev.approved_count||0)+count}).eq('id',evtId);
  toast('Approved ✓'); renderRes(); renderAdminStats();
}
async function rejR(id) { await SB.from('reservations').update({status:'rejected'}).eq('id',id); toast('Rejected'); renderRes(); }
function setRC(el,s) { document.querySelectorAll('#rChips .ch').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('active')); el.classList.add('active'); rF=s; renderRes(); }

// ── QR SCAN ──
async function scanQR() {
  const inp = document.getElementById('qrInput').value.trim().toUpperCase();
  const res = document.getElementById('qrRes');
  if (!inp) { toast('Enter QR code'); return; }
  res.style.display='block'; res.className='qr-res'; res.innerHTML='<div class="spin"></div>';
  const { data: r } = await SB.from('reservations').select('*').eq('qr_id',inp).single();
  if (!r) { res.className='qr-res i'; res.innerHTML='<span class="qr-big">INVALID</span>Code not found.'; return; }
  if (r.status==='used') { res.className='qr-res u'; res.innerHTML=`<span class="qr-big">USED</span>${r.name}<br>This ticket was already used.`; return; }
  if (r.status!=='approved') { res.className='qr-res i'; res.innerHTML=`<span class="qr-big">NOT APPROVED</span>${r.name}<br>Reservation pending approval.`; return; }
  await SB.from('reservations').update({status:'used'}).eq('id',r.id);
  res.className='qr-res v';
  res.innerHTML=`<span class="qr-big">ENTRY ✓</span>${r.name}<br>${r.event_name} · ${r.count} guest${r.count>1?'s':''}<br>🎫 ${r.member_code||''}`;
  document.getElementById('qrInput').value='';
}

// ── ANNOUNCEMENT ──
async function loadAnn() {
  const { data } = await SB.from('settings').select('value').eq('key','announcement').single();
  if (data) { const el = document.getElementById('annBox'); if(el) el.textContent=data.value; const at=document.getElementById('annTxt'); if(at) at.value=data.value; }
}
async function saveAdminCreds() {
  const user = document.getElementById('newAdminUser').value.trim();
  const pw = document.getElementById('newAdminPw').value;
  if (!user || !pw) { toast('Enter both username and password'); return; }
  await SB.from('settings').upsert({key:'admin_credentials', value:JSON.stringify({username:user,password:pw})});
  toast('Admin credentials updated ✓');
  document.getElementById('newAdminUser').value = '';
  document.getElementById('newAdminPw').value = '';
}

async function saveAnn() {
  const val = document.getElementById('annTxt').value;
  await SB.from('settings').upsert({key:'announcement',value:val});
  const el = document.getElementById('annBox'); if(el) el.textContent=val;
  toast('Announcement updated ✓');
}

// ── REALTIME ──
function setupRealtime() {
  SB.channel('admin-rt')
    .on('postgres_changes',{event:'*',schema:'public',table:'members'},()=>{
      renderAdminStats();
      if(document.getElementById('ap-mb').classList.contains('active')){renderMStats();renderM();}
      if(document.getElementById('ap-ov').classList.contains('active')){renderRecM();}
    })
    .on('postgres_changes',{event:'*',schema:'public',table:'reservations'},()=>{
      renderAdminStats();
      if(document.getElementById('ap-rs').classList.contains('active'))renderRes();
      if(document.getElementById('ap-ov').classList.contains('active'))renderRecR();
    }).subscribe();
}

// ── UTILS ──
function fmtDate(s) {
  if (!s) return '';
  const d = new Date(s + 'T12:00:00');
  return d.toLocaleDateString('en-GB', {day:'numeric',month:'short',year:'numeric'});
}
function toast(msg) { const t=document.getElementById('toastEl'); t.textContent=msg; t.classList.add('show'); setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),2800); }

// ── BRANDING ──
async function loadBranding() {
  try {
    const { data } = await SB.from('settings').select('key,value').in('key',['logo','slogan']);
    if (!data) return;
    data.forEach(row => {
      if (row.key === 'logo' && row.value) {
        document.getElementById('brandLogo').src = row.value;
        const lp = document.getElementById('logoPreview');
        if (lp) lp.src = row.value;
      }
      if (row.key === 'slogan' && row.value) {
        document.getElementById('brandSlogan').textContent = row.value;
        const st = document.getElementById('sloganTxt');
        if (st) st.value = row.value;
      }
    });
  } catch(e) {}
}

async function uploadLogo(e) {
  const f = e.target.files[0]; if (!f) return;
  const r = new FileReader();
  r.onload = async ev => {
    const val = ev.target.result;
    document.getElementById('brandLogo').src = val;
    document.getElementById('logoPreview').src = val;
    await SB.from('settings').upsert({key:'logo',value:val});
    toast('Logo updated ✓');
  };
  r.readAsDataURL(f);
}

async function saveBranding() {
  const slogan = document.getElementById('sloganTxt').value.trim();
  if (slogan) {
    await SB.from('settings').upsert({key:'slogan',value:slogan});
    document.getElementById('brandSlogan').textContent = slogan;
  }
  toast('Branding saved ✓');
}

// ── CAMERA QR ──
let camStream = null, camTimer = null;

async function startCam() {
  try {
    camStream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
      video: { facingMode: 'environment', width: { ideal: 640 }, height: { ideal: 640 } }
    });
    const video = document.getElementById('qrVideo');
    video.srcObject = camStream;
    video.style.display = 'block';
    video.play();
    document.getElementById('camOff').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('camOn').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('qrRes').style.display = 'none';
    camTimer = setInterval(scanFrame, 300);
  } catch(e) {
    toast('Camera access denied. Use manual entry.');
  }
}

function stopCam() {
  if (camStream) { camStream.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop()); camStream = null; }
  if (camTimer) { clearInterval(camTimer); camTimer = null; }
  const video = document.getElementById('qrVideo');
  video.style.display = 'none'; video.srcObject = null;
  document.getElementById('camOff').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('camOn').style.display = 'none';
}

function scanFrame() {
  const video = document.getElementById('qrVideo');
  if (!video || video.readyState !== video.HAVE_ENOUGH_DATA) return;
  const canvas = document.getElementById('qrCanvas');
  canvas.width = video.videoWidth; canvas.height = video.videoHeight;
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  ctx.drawImage(video, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
  const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
  const code = jsQR(imageData.data, imageData.width, imageData.height, { inversionAttempts: 'dontInvert' });
  if (code && code.data && code.data.startsWith('NIP-')) {
    stopCam();
    document.getElementById('qrInput').value = code.data;
    scanQR();
  }
}

// ── BOOT ──
boot();
setupRealtime();
</script>

</body>
</html>
